About

Background
Raashid Shaik · Houston, TX

I'm a data analyst with a dual academic background in Management Information Systems and Computer Science — a combination that lets me operate fluently across both the business and technical dimensions of data work.

I graduated from Lamar University in May 2026 with a 3.90 GPA, where I built four end-to-end projects spanning Power BI dashboards, relational databases, web applications, and network analytics. I care deeply about the gap between raw data and real decisions — and closing it.

I'm comfortable with SQL, Python, and Power BI, and I thrive in cross-functional environments where I can translate complex findings into language stakeholders can act on.

Open to: Data Analyst · BI Analyst · Business Analyst
